English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell Adult University records
Cornell Adult University
41-8-3726
1.1 cubic feet. 1.1 cubic foot.
1971-2009. Printed Materials Records of adult university offered by Cornell University, including course lists, compilations, announcements, and other related material. Collection material in English 6412611
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2009
EAD encoding:
Jessica Shon, February 10, 2009
Date modified:
RMC Staff, May 2013
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
This continuing education program for Cornell alumni began July, 1968.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of adult university offered by Cornell University, including course lists, compilations, announcements, and other related material.
Cite As:
Cornell Adult University records, #41-8-3726. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
